theme_notes: Today's touchstones: France 2-0 Morocco in the World Cup quarterfinals (Mbappé's 8th goal, France perfect in 6 straight); US-Iran military escalation (90+ targets hit for a second day, Iran retaliated on US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain, Trump declared the MOU 'over'); Trump pressuring FIFA to reverse a red card (granted, first time since 1962); Marine Le Pen ankle-tagged and still running for the French presidency; NATO summit in Ankara yielding a Patriot missile production license for Ukraine.
settled: France won 6 straight. The US-Iran ceasefire lasted 6 hours. You two are doing great.
Even the US-Iran MOU didn't last this long. This balance somehow has.
Cleaner books than the FIFA rulebook after Trump got involved.
youOwe: Less than a World Cup quarterfinal beer. The embarrassment is free.
Trump called FIFA to lift a red card for $0. Nobody's calling in favors for your $35.
Mbappé missed a penalty and still scored twice. You haven't scored once.
The US hit 90 Iranian targets for blocking a shipping lane. You blocked nothing. No excuses.
Le Pen's running for president in an ankle monitor. You can't even run a Venmo.
France dismantled Morocco 2-0. You're getting dismantled at brunch.
Iran struck US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain. Your partner is practicing restraint.
France scored twice in 6 minutes. You've paid zero times in 6 months.
This is what it costs when the MOU is over. Ask Trump. Ask yourself.
The US didn't ask Iran's permission before bombing. Your partner isn't asking nicely either.
NATO licensed Ukraine to build Patriot missiles. Nobody's licensing your delay.
Le Pen's ankle monitor budget per year. Hers is court-ordered. Yours would be worse.
CENTCOM hit 90 targets for less provocation than this. Consider it a first warning.
France hasn't conceded a goal all tournament. You haven't made a payment all year.
Trump declared the Iran MOU 'over' at NATO. Your partner is drafting a similar release.
The US struck Iran's entire southern coastline. Your partner has catalogued everything you own.
Mbappé scored 8 World Cup goals. You've scored 0 payments. One of you is performing.
Iran and the US are in a shooting war. You're in a worse spot: out of goodwill too.
theyOwe: They owe you the price of a World Cup hot dog. Dignity demands you collect.
Less than what Le Pen's lawyer charges per minute. Non-negotiable.
Mbappé's post-game espresso costs more. Collect with 60th-minute energy.
France sent Morocco home without conceding a goal. Be that professional.
FIFA reversed a red card under political pressure. Apply some. It works.
Iran retaliated within hours. Just noting that for reference.
The US bombed 80 targets over shipping lane access. They're blocking your money. Proportional.
Mbappé scored his 8th of the tournament. You've received 0 payments from this person all year.
Enough for a NATO summit delegate fee. Demand it with Zelenskyy's urgency.
Iran's IRGC launched joint drone and missile strikes for less. You have options.
Trump called FIFA and got the rules changed in 24 hours. You've been waiting 6 months.
France scored twice in 6 minutes once they decided to. Decisions can happen fast.
The US-Iran ceasefire lasted less than a week. Your patience has lasted longer. Barely.
France is unbeaten, unscored on, and merciless in attack. Take the hint.
Zelenskyy flew to Ankara and left with Patriot licenses. You get nothing. Collect anyway.
Iran hit US bases in two countries at once. Scale your response accordingly.
France: 6 wins, 0 goals conceded. You: 1 debt, 0 payments. One of you plays soccer wrong.
Le Pen's ankle-monitored and running for the Elysée. Your partner owes this and runs free.
